# Boostyou.ai

> WoW Classic leveling and guide site: speed-leveling routes from 1 to 90, all 10 class / 30 spec leveling builds, profession guides for every expansion era, leveling-guide comparisons, and news coverage including the WoW Camelot (Classic+) leak. Updated July 2026. Run by Nutri (YouTube/Twitch content creator). The site partners with RestedXP (affiliate links marked rel="sponsored").

Current game state covered (July 2026):
- WoW Classic Anniversary (TBC): Phase 2 "Overlords of Outland" — Serpentshrine Cavern & Tempest Keep live since May 14, 2026
- Mists of Pandaria Classic: Phase 5 — Siege of Orgrimmar live since June 4, 2026
- WoW Camelot: unannounced Blizzard project from a credible leaked timeline (Q3 2026), widely believed to be WoW Classic Plus; reveal expected at BlizzCon 2026 (September)

## News & Leaks

- [WoW Camelot: The Classic+ Leak, Explained](https://boostyou.ai/content/wow-camelot.html): Full leak hub — leaked timeline, 1.15→1.60 version jump, Heroic/Epic license datamining, credibility track record, FAQ. Updated as new leaks drop.
- [Latest content hub](https://boostyou.ai/content/newcontent.html): Phase news, YouTube/Twitch drops, free RestedXP guide packs on CurseForge.

## Leveling Routes

- [Leveling overview & guide comparison](https://boostyou.ai/content/fast-leveling.html): RestedXP vs Zygor vs Joana vs free alternatives, tested rankings.
- [Fastest 1-60 (Classic)](https://boostyou.ai/content/fastest-1-60.html)
- [Fastest 60-70 (TBC)](https://boostyou.ai/content/fastest-60-70.html)
- [Fastest 70-80 (WotLK)](https://boostyou.ai/content/fastest-70-80.html)
- [Fastest 80-85 (MoP Classic, Cataclysm zones)](https://boostyou.ai/content/fastest-80-85.html)
- [Fastest 85-90 (MoP Classic, Pandaria)](https://boostyou.ai/content/fastest-85-90.html)
- [Dungeon vs Questing efficiency analysis](https://boostyou.ai/content/dungeon-vs-questing.html)

## Classes

- [Class guides hub](https://boostyou.ai/content/class-guides.html): Leveling builds for all 10 classes and 30 specs (Classic through WotLK, incl. Death Knight). Individual pages follow the pattern /content/<class>-<spec>.html, e.g. /content/mage-frost.html, /content/paladin-retribution.html.

## Professions

- [Professions hub](https://boostyou.ai/content/professions.html): Expansion-aware guides for every profession. Individual pages: /content/alchemy.html, /content/engineering.html, /content/herbalism.html, etc.

## Comparisons

- [RestedXP vs Zygor](https://boostyou.ai/content/restedxp-vs-zygor.html)
- [RestedXP vs Joana](https://boostyou.ai/content/restedxp-vs-joana.html)
- [Free vs Premium leveling guides](https://boostyou.ai/content/free-vs-premium.html)

<!-- bis-pages:start (generated by tools/bis_pages.py) -->

## BiS Lists (PvE Best in Slot)

- [BiS list index](https://boostyou.ai/content/bis-all.html): 625 published lists — per-spec BiS gear with exact drop sources, enchants and gems. Covered so far: Classic p1, Classic p2, Classic p3, Classic p4, Classic p5, Classic p6, Classic preraid, MoP p1, MoP p2, MoP p3, MoP preraid, TBC p1, TBC p2, TBC p3, TBC p4, TBC p5, TBC preraid, WotLK p1, WotLK p2, WotLK p3, WotLK p4, WotLK preraid. Individual pages: /content/bis-<expansion>-<phase>-<class>-<spec>.html, e.g. /content/bis-mop-p3-warrior-arms.html.
- [Interactive BiS browser](https://boostyou.ai/content/bis.html): same data, pick expansion → phase → class → spec.
- Raw data (JSON, one file per list): https://boostyou.ai/content/bis-data/<expansion>-<phase>-<class>-<spec>.json

<!-- bis-pages:end -->
